'''Chlar Kotchmin''' was an [[Sentientologist|anthropologist]] who worked as an assistant to [[Mammon Hoole]]. [[Gender/Legends|He]] was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by an [[arachnor]] on [[Arzid]].

{{Char-stub}}
